calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar this day as assigned by Dept. 206 for Court Trial.
Dept. 514, Judge: Cecilia Castellanos, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Not reported.

Casey M. Jensen, Esq. apecial appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Defendant Dulce M. Ortiz present in pro per, and not contest the judgment to be entered.

The Court hears oral testimony from the parties, considers all the evidence presented, and the Admissions Set One, Requests Nos. 1 through 13, that were deemed admitted on May 31, 2017 by Discovery/Law & Motion Dept. (Order was not submitted).

The Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $6,874.84
Costs $377.45.
Waived Sanction, for a total judgment in the amount of $7,252.29.
Written Court Judgment was submitted and signed in open Court.
Court stands adjourned.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION TO DEEM FACTS AS ADMITTED.

No appearances. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: the motion was unopposed. Defendant's Request for Admissions Set One, Requests Nos. 1 through 13, are hereby deemed admitted. The Court also grants the request for sanctions against plaintiff in the amount of $260.00. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge Pro Tem: David Helbraun, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Text Ruling
